creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Are you still interested in getting this patch in?  I see that you have deleted the distfile you provided.  If you are no longer interested, please close the PR.

Instead of self-hosting the distfile, perhaps we can just fetch from the KDE store?

Also note that "Created by" headers have been abolished.  Please remove them from your patch.  We have also moved WWW: from pkg-descr to the Makefile where it's now a variable WWW= ...
